name: Fruit Tacos
recipeIngredient: 1 medium Apple, pared, cored and chopped
2 tbsp Pourable fruit, any flavor (found in jelly section of store)
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread coconut on baking sheet. Toast in 350°F oven for 7 to 12 minutes, stirring often.
2. Meanwhile, stir together strawberries, grapes, apple, banana, and pourable fruit in a medium bowl.
3. Fill taco shells evenly with the fruit mixture.
4. Top filled tacos evenly with yogurt.
5. Sprinkle with toasted coconut.
